case_title: STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF VS. PHUONG THI DUONG

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT DUONG, PHUONG THI DBA YUCATASIA DELI & SANDWICH JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
